prior.result: # Bug Summary\nA public regression causes the settings page to drop unsaved form values after a router refresh. Repro is stable in staging and the fix likely lives in src/router.ts.

function.name: sessions_send
function.arguments: {"sessionKey":"reviewer-frontend","message":"Please triage this public bug summary: the settings page loses unsaved values after a router refresh, repro is stable in staging, and src/router.ts is the likely fix area.","timeoutSeconds":20,"reference_tool_id":["call_read_public_bug_summary"]}
